channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: FTC Employees Vote to Unionize, NTEU Representing 36 Agencies: A Major Shift in the Workplace
item.description: Federal Trade Commission (FTC) employees voted overwhelmingly to join the National Treasury Employees Union (NTEU), marking a significant change in the workplace. The unionization process has been underway since 2023, with concerns over telework access, politicization of the civil service, and other issues.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
